name: extraction_blackbox_cases
description: Independent 100-case extraction holdout with shuffled difficulty and broad scenario coverage. Intended for periodic black-box evaluation rather than daily case-by-case fitting.

cases.description: explicit profile bundle with beverage habit
cases.input:
User: My name is Nora, I work at Figma, and I usually start my day with green tea.
Assistant: Noted.

match_any: starts the day with green tea

cases.description: stable tool preference mixed with transient deploy failure
cases.input:
User: I use tmux every day, but the deploy script timed out twice after I retried it.
Assistant: Check the logs.

cases.description: multi-turn preference with compact replies and numbered lists
cases.input:
User: Please keep replies compact.
Assistant: Sure.
User: Numbered lists help me more than paragraphs.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: domain-conditioned writing preferences should stay separated
cases.input:
User: For release notes I want bullet lists, but for design writeups I prefer full paragraphs.
Assistant: Got it.

match_any: prefers full paragraphs for design writeups

cases.description: simple hypothetical vacation plan should not be stored
cases.input:
User: If I ever spend a summer in Spain, I might learn Spanish cooking.
Assistant: Sounds fun.

cases.description: external advice should not override current tool choice
cases.input:
User: My teammate keeps telling me to switch to Neovim, but I still use plain Vim.
Assistant: Understood.

cases.description: temporal work shift from ops to AI tools
cases.input:
User: I used to work in ops, and now I build internal AI tools.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: negative beverage update with sparkling water replacement
cases.input:
User: I don't drink soda anymore; these days I mostly drink sparkling water.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: health sensitivity and nighttime habit across turns
cases.input:
User: Bright screens give me headaches.
Assistant: Okay.
User: I always turn on dark mode at night.
Assistant: Got it.

match_any: turn on dark mode at night

cases.description: single Chinese question should not trigger language inference
cases.input:
User: 请问 Rust 适合写服务端吗？
Assistant: 很适合高性能场景。

cases.description: new activity plus weekly cadence
cases.input:
User: I started bouldering in February.
Assistant: Nice.
User: I go twice a week after work.
Assistant: Keep it up.

match_any: go twice a week after work

cases.description: quoted assistant advice should not replace actual preference
cases.input:
User: You suggested bullet points before, but honestly short paragraphs work better for me.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: location and named pet in one sentence
cases.input:
User: I live in Taipei and I have a golden retriever named Coco.
Assistant: Nice.

cases.description: committed travel plan with flight and hotel booking
cases.input:
User: I already booked flights to Seoul for April and reserved a hotel near Hongdae.
Assistant: Exciting.

match_any: booked flights to Seoul for April

cases.description: mixed-language summary and default-language preference
cases.input:
User: 我平时中文交流，但 weekly summaries please in English.
Assistant: 收到。

cases.description: friend attribution should not create a wrong identity fact
cases.input:
User: My friend says I must be a designer because I care about typography, but I'm actually a backend engineer.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: semicolon hobbies should split cleanly
cases.input:
User: I collect fountain pens; I enjoy road cycling; I cook on weekends.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: pure troubleshooting chatter should stay empty
cases.input:
User: I tailed the logs, rolled back once, and still got a 502.
Assistant: Try the previous image tag.

cases.description: role change from support management to product ops
cases.input:
User: Last year I managed a support team, now I do product operations.
Assistant: Understood.

cases.description: current rental fact should survive nested future hypothetical
cases.input:
User: Right now I rent in Osaka, and if my visa changes later, maybe I'll move to Kyoto.
Assistant: Understood.

cases.description: note-taking tools across turns
cases.input:
User: I write notes in Obsidian.
Assistant: Okay.
User: For quick captures I still use Apple Notes.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: assistant-only workflow suggestion should not create memory
cases.input:
User: Thanks for the recap.
Assistant: You should switch to kanban and keep all updates shorter.

cases.description: deep work preference and time block
cases.input:
User: I do deep work best before lunch.
Assistant: Nice.
User: I usually block 9 to 11 for it.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: feedback tone preference should depend on context
cases.input:
User: For code reviews I want blunt feedback, but for brainstorming I prefer softer language.
Assistant: Understood.

match_any: wants blunt feedback for code reviews

cases.description: past and current city should both survive
cases.input:
User: I lived in Chengdu before, but now I'm in Shenzhen.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: weekday diet should survive transient app outage
cases.input:
User: I eat vegetarian most weekdays, but tonight's grocery app kept timing out.
Assistant: Retry later.

cases.description: commute mode and train seating preference across turns
cases.input:
User: I normally take the subway to work.
Assistant: Okay.
User: Aisle seats are better for me on trains.
Assistant: Noted.

match_any: normally take the subway to work

cases.description: commute update from driving to biking
cases.input:
User: I no longer drive to the office; now I bike there most days.
Assistant: Got it.

match_any: no longer drive to the office
no longer drives to the office
bikes to the office most days

cases.description: role, location, and daily tool usage
cases.input:
User: I'm a data analyst who lives in Melbourne and uses SQL every day.
Assistant: Nice.

cases.description: manager pressure should not displace current language choice
cases.input:
User: 我的主管一直让我多写 Java，但我现在主要写 Go。
Assistant: 明白。

cases.description: English advice question should remain empty
cases.input:
User: Should I switch from Notion to Obsidian?
Assistant: It depends on how you search your notes.

cases.description: default language plus English board updates and brevity
cases.input:
User: 我通常用中文，不过 board updates should be in English and very brief.
Assistant: 收到。

match_any: board updates should be in English

cases.description: allergy and resulting checking habit
cases.input:
User: I'm allergic to peanuts, so I always check dessert labels.
Assistant: Understood.

cases.description: memory leak troubleshooting should not hide stable language stack
cases.input:
User: I was chasing a memory leak all morning, but day to day I write Rust and Python.
Assistant: Check heap snapshots.

cases.description: family and mentoring bundle
cases.input:
User: I live with my sister, I mentor two interns, and I foster one cat.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: quoted social suggestion should not become style preference
cases.input:
User: People keep saying 'use more emojis', but I prefer a neutral tone.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: phatic check-in should not create memory
cases.input:
User: Hey, are you there?
Assistant: Yep.

cases.description: speculative startup move should stay empty
cases.input:
User: If funding goes through, I may join a startup in Lisbon.
Assistant: That would be a big move.

cases.description: workout timing changed from mornings to nights
cases.input:
User: I used to swim in the mornings, but now I go at night.
Assistant: Okay.

match_any: used to swim in the mornings

cases.description: work updates and journaling have different style preferences
cases.input:
User: My work updates should stay concise, but journal entries can be long and reflective.
Assistant: Understood.

match_any: journal entries can be long and reflective

cases.description: language learning with daily flashcard habit
cases.input:
User: I started learning Korean this spring, and I review flashcards every evening.
Assistant: Nice.

cases.description: failed rollout should not hide stable infrastructure tool
cases.input:
User: The rollout failed twice today, but I manage everything with Terraform.
Assistant: Let's inspect state.

cases.description: reading device preference corrected across turns
cases.input:
User: I used to read on a Kindle.
Assistant: Okay.
User: Actually now I only read on my iPad.
Assistant: Noted.

match_any: used to read on a Kindle

cases.description: quoted assistant explanation should not overshadow actual learning preference
cases.input:
User: You said Python is beginner-friendly, but for me the real issue is I prefer hands-on examples.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: profile facts spread across three turns
cases.input:
User: I work at Canva.
Assistant: Nice.
User: I'm based in Sydney.
Assistant: Got it.
User: I usually drink jasmine tea.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: Chinese advice question should remain empty
cases.input:
User: 请问你觉得我该不该学西班牙语？
Assistant: 如果你常去西语地区可以考虑。

cases.description: pet care routine across turns
cases.input:
User: I have two rabbits and I clean their room every Sunday.
Assistant: Nice.
User: I also buy hay in bulk once a month.
Assistant: Got it.

match_any: buy hay in bulk once a month

cases.description: Chinese negated drink update with replacement beverage
cases.input:
User: 我现在不喝奶茶了，改喝无糖气泡水。
Assistant: 好的。

cases.description: lease and move date form a committed relocation plan
cases.input:
User: I signed a lease in Rotterdam and move there in May.
Assistant: Exciting.

cases.description: current Chinese work location should survive hypothetical reorg move
cases.input:
User: 我目前在苏州工作，如果之后团队重组，可能会去成都。
Assistant: 收到。

cases.description: CI pipeline failure noise should not create memory
cases.input:
User: CI 流水线又挂了，跑了三遍都是同一个 stage 报错。
Assistant: 看看是不是缓存没清。

cases.description: explicit profile with employer and weekend hobby
cases.input:
User: I'm Maya, I work at Shopify, and I do pottery on weekends.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: tone preference differs between email and Slack
cases.input:
User: In emails I keep things formal, but on Slack I'm super casual.
Assistant: Makes sense.

cases.description: 中文职业变化：从教师到产品经理
cases.input:
User: 我以前是高中数学老师，去年转行做产品经理了。
Assistant: 变化挺大的。

cases.description: advice question about TypeScript should not create memory
cases.input:
User: Do you think TypeScript is worth learning in 2026?
Assistant: It's widely adopted in frontend and full-stack projects.

cases.description: 偏头痛触发因素和应对方式
cases.input:
User: 我有偏头痛的毛病，强光容易诱发。
Assistant: 有什么缓解方式吗？
User: 我发作时会吃布洛芬，然后去暗房休息。
Assistant: 了解了。

cases.description: 中英混合表达工作语言和任务命名习惯
cases.input:
User: 我习惯用中文写周报，但 task titles 我都写英文，方便和海外同事对齐。
Assistant: 了解。

cases.description: piano learning and practice schedule across turns
cases.input:
User: I've been taking piano lessons since last fall.
Assistant: How's it going?
User: Good. I practice about 45 minutes every morning before work.
Assistant: That's consistent.

match_any: taking piano lessons since last fall

cases.description: 不再用微信办公，改用钉钉
cases.input:
User: 我们团队不再用微信沟通工作了，全部切到钉钉了。
Assistant: 切换顺利吗？

match_any: no longer uses WeChat for work

cases.description: lives alone with a parrot named Rio
cases.input:
User: I live alone but I have a parrot named Rio who keeps me company.
Assistant: That's cute.

cases.description: current employer should survive hypothetical layoff scenario
cases.input:
User: I work at Datadog right now, but if there are layoffs I'd probably freelance.
Assistant: Hopefully it won't come to that.

cases.description: 冥想频率和时间段
cases.input:
User: 我每天早上起来先冥想十分钟。
Assistant: 养成习惯了？
User: 嗯，坚持一年多了，一般六点半开始。
Assistant: 不错。

cases.description: assistant suggestion about journaling should not create memory
cases.input:
User: I've been feeling scattered lately.
Assistant: Have you tried morning journaling? It can help organize your thoughts and set priorities for the day.

cases.description: 设计工具偏好：Figma 和 Sketch
cases.input:
User: 我做 UI 设计，平时主要用 Figma，偶尔用 Sketch 做 icon。
Assistant: 明白。

cases.description: video recommendation vs user's own productivity style
cases.input:
User: I watched a video claiming the Pomodoro technique is the best, but honestly I just work in long 3-hour blocks without breaks.
Assistant: Whatever works for you.

cases.description: enrolled in evening MBA starting next semester
cases.input:
User: I just enrolled in an evening MBA at NYU, starting this September.
Assistant: That's a big commitment.

cases.description: prefers standing desks and natural light
cases.input:
User: I always pick a standing desk with natural light when I can.
Assistant: Same here.

cases.description: 日常写 TypeScript 但今天构建报错
cases.input:
User: 我每天写 TypeScript，今天不知道为什么 build 一直报类型错误。
Assistant: 检查一下 tsconfig 的 strict 选项。

cases.description: diet shift from keto to Mediterranean
cases.input:
User: I did keto for two years but dropped it last month. Now I'm following a Mediterranean diet.
Assistant: How's the transition?

cases.description: 中文工具选择问句不应提取
cases.input:
User: Notion 和 Logseq 哪个更适合做个人知识库？
Assistant: 看你更喜欢数据库视图还是双链笔记。

cases.description: 中文多轮画像：姓名、城市、爱好
cases.input:
User: 我叫林婷。
Assistant: 你好。
User: 我在厦门。
Assistant: 好的。
User: 我特别喜欢吃芒果。
Assistant: 记住了。

cases.description: DNS and certificate errors should not create memory
cases.input:
User: We're getting DNS resolution failures on the staging cluster and the TLS cert expired yesterday.
Assistant: Renew the cert first and check the resolver config.

cases.description: 季节性情绪波动和光疗习惯
cases.input:
User: 我一到冬天情绪就很低落，医生说是季节性情绪障碍。我每天早上用光疗灯照半小时。
Assistant: 坚持治疗很重要。

cases.description: gardening hobby with watering schedule across turns
cases.input:
User: I keep a small herb garden on my balcony.
Assistant: What do you grow?
User: Basil, mint, and rosemary. I water them every other day.
Assistant: Sounds nice.

cases.description: 和父母同住，弟弟在读大学
cases.input:
User: 我现在和父母一起住，我弟弟在读大学。
Assistant: 家里人挺多的。

cases.description: 不再晨跑，改成晚上散步
cases.input:
User: 我不再晨跑了，现在改成每天晚上饭后散步四十分钟。
Assistant: 也不错。

match_any: no longer runs in the morning

cases.description: 中英混合的 IDE 选择习惯
cases.input:
User: 我写代码主要用 IntelliJ，但 quick scripts 我会直接开 VS Code，比较轻量。
Assistant: 看场景选工具。

match_any: uses VS Code for quick scripts

cases.description: API docs vs blog posts have different style needs
cases.input:
User: For API docs I want everything terse and code-heavy, but my blog posts should be conversational with analogies.
Assistant: Understood.

cases.description: registered for a half-marathon with training started
cases.input:
User: I registered for the Chicago half-marathon in October and started training last week.
Assistant: Good luck.

cases.description: assistant 建议用待办工具不应成为记忆
cases.input:
User: 最近总是忘事。
Assistant: 你可以试试 Todoist 或者 TickTick，系统化管理待办很有帮助。

cases.description: frontend stack with React, Tailwind and Vite
cases.input:
User: I'm a frontend engineer. My go-to stack is React with Tailwind CSS and Vite for builds.
Assistant: Solid choices.

cases.description: 每周三次瑜伽加周末长跑
cases.input:
User: 我周一三五晚上去瑜伽馆，周六早上跑十公里。
Assistant: 运动量挺大的。

cases.description: 当前在南京工作，假设性调去上海
cases.input:
User: 我目前在南京的 office 上班，如果公司有调岗机会，可能考虑去上海。
Assistant: 两个城市都不错。

cases.description: prefers paper books and visits library weekly
cases.input:
User: I only read paper books.
Assistant: Old school.
User: Yeah, I go to the library every Saturday morning.
Assistant: Nice routine.

match_any: goes to the library every Saturday

cases.description: 同事建议换笔记工具，但用户坚持 Notion
cases.input:
User: 同事一直劝我换飞书文档，但我觉得还是 Notion 最顺手。
Assistant: 用着习惯就好。

cases.description: daily Postgres user with transient connection pool issue
cases.input:
User: I use Postgres for everything, but today the connection pool keeps maxing out.
Assistant: Check your pool size and idle timeout settings.

cases.description: 通勤方式从地铁变为骑电动车
cases.input:
User: 以前我坐地铁上班，现在骑电动车，十五分钟就到了。
Assistant: 挺方便。

cases.description: CI tool recommendation question should not create memory
cases.input:
User: What's the best CI/CD tool for a small team these days? GitHub Actions or GitLab CI or something else?
Assistant: For small teams, GitHub Actions is often the easiest to start with.

cases.description: 麸质过敏和替代主食
cases.input:
User: 我对麸质过敏，所以面包、面条这些我都不碰。
Assistant: 那主食吃什么？
User: 主要吃米饭和红薯。
Assistant: 了解。

cases.description: 用户纠正 assistant 的错误推断
cases.input:
User: 我最近在看很多设计相关的书。
Assistant: 你是做设计的吗？
User: 不是，我是后端开发，只是对交互设计感兴趣。
Assistant: 明白了。

cases.description: reads sci-fi for 30 minutes before bed nightly
cases.input:
User: I read for about 30 minutes before bed every night. Mostly sci-fi.
Assistant: Any favorites?

cases.description: 不再用 Slack，全面迁移到飞书
cases.input:
User: 我们公司不再用 Slack 了，全部迁到飞书。我自己也觉得飞书的文档协作好用一些。
Assistant: 切换成本大吗？

cases.description: 领养流浪狗，每天遛两次
cases.input:
User: 我上个月领养了一只流浪狗。
Assistant: 什么品种？
User: 串串，叫豆豆。每天早晚各遛一次。
Assistant: 挺有心的。

cases.description: 数据库超时混合稳定 ORM 选择
cases.input:
User: 今天数据库连接一直超时，不过平时我都是用 SQLAlchemy 操作数据库的，很少出问题。
Assistant: 看看是不是连接池配置有问题。

match_any: 用 SQLAlchemy 操作数据库

cases.description: 中文多轮爱好：书法和每周练习
cases.input:
User: 我最近在学书法。
Assistant: 写的什么体？
User: 楷书，每周日下午练两个小时。
Assistant: 很有毅力。

match_any: 每周日下午练两个小时

cases.description: accepted job offer with confirmed start date
cases.input:
User: I accepted an offer from Cloudflare and my start date is April 15th.
Assistant: Congrats!

cases.description: roommate's habit should not become user's memory
cases.input:
User: My roommate is vegan and cooks every night, but I usually just order takeout.
Assistant: Do you eat together?

cases.description: user rejects assistant's IDE suggestion and states own choice
cases.input:
User: Last time you recommended trying WebStorm, but I gave it a shot and still prefer VS Code for everything.
Assistant: Fair enough.

cases.description: data scientist using R and Julia daily
cases.input:
User: I'm a data scientist. I use R for statistical modeling and Julia for heavy computation.
Assistant: Interesting combo.

cases.description: 当前在武汉工作，假设性调去广州
cases.input:
User: 我在武汉这边的研发中心上班，听说广州那边也在扩招，如果有合适的岗位我可能会考虑过去。
Assistant: 可以关注一下内推。
